title: hieracium hispanicum subsp. dimorphotrichum
intro: Hieracium hispanicum subsp. dimorphotrichum is a subspecies of the Hieracium hispanicum plant, commonly known as the Spanish hawk's beard or Spanish yellow hawkweed, which is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, providing various health benefits such as antioxidant, anti-cancer, and cardiovascular protective effects. Hieracium hispanicum subsp. dimorphotrichum can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
